hooks.command: echo $ARGUMENTS | jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE '^git (commit|push|merge)' && (echo 'Running pre-commit health checks...' && ./scripts/check-health.sh > /tmp/health-check.log 2>&1 && echo 'Health checks passed' || (echo 'Health checks FAILED:'; tail -10 /tmp/health-check.log; exit 1)) || true
